description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 3, 2024 at 8:22 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck (tow truck) in a parking lot at 3775 Mountain View Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked in a stall of a parking lot at 3775 Mountain View Avenue when a tow truck traveling through the parking lot 
made contact with the rear passenger side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not 
engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
